# Inventory goctl Replay Rollback

If this imported multi-group replay stops generating deterministic artifacts or
the generated module no longer compiles, pin the previous `gozero-compatible`
generator profile and keep the last passing generated cache template.

Treat import resolution regressions, unclassified multi-middleware route diffs,
and complex model/cache output changes as breaking candidates until a migration
note classifies them as compatible additions or generated cache template
changes.
